title: Stock market today: S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit fresh records, Tesla reports earnings
snippet: US stocks rose to fresh record highs. S&P 500 rose more than 1% to hit a fresh record. Nasdaq Composite led higher, jumping 1.6% to close at a new high. Dow gained around 0.7%. Ceasefire extension and strong Q1 earnings (Tesla) boosted sentiment.
tag_reason: 금일 증시 사상 최고가 갱신은 신규 시장 이벤트.
